zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I於1113年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Wielher29歲，母親Rebecca Lynn Wheel29歲。他於大約1130年與Sisanna Hannah在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1155年在他的家鄉享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I于1113年出生在英国时，他的父亲Thomas Wielher29岁，母亲Rebecca Lynn Wheel29岁。他于大约1130年与Sisanna Hannah在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1155年在他的家乡享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wielher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Trud.
perhaps a topographic name from Middle High German wuol, wüele ‘waterhole’ + -er.
habitational name for someone from a place called Wiehl or Wielen (see   Wiehl   and   Wiele  ).

variants.name: Wiehl
meanings: topographic name from Middle High German wuol(lache) ‘wallowing place’.
habitational name from any of the places called Wiehl, Wihl, or Wil in Germany and Switzerland.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I was born in 1113, in England, his father, Thomas Wielher, was 29 and his mother, Rebecca Lynn Wheel, was 29. He married Sisanna Hannah about 1130, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1155, in his hometown, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I est né en 1113, à Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wielher, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Rebecca Lynn Wheel, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Sisanna Hannah environ 1130, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1155, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I 1113 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wielher 29 und seine Mutter Rebecca Lynn Wheel 29. Er hat um 1130 in England Sisanna Hannah geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1155 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I è nato il nel 1113 nel England, il suo padre, Thomas Wielher, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Rebecca Lynn Wheel, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Sisanna Hannah circa 1130, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1155, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Thomas Wielher Iが1113年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Wielherは29歳，母Rebecca Lynn Wheelは29歳であった。約1130年にイギリスでSisanna Hannahと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1155年に故郷で42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I(이)가 1113년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wielher(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Rebecca Lynn Wheel(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1130년 영국에서 Sisanna Hannah(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1155년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I nasceu em 1113, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wielher, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Rebecca Lynn Wheel, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Sisanna Hannah aproximadamente 1130, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1155, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I родился в 1113 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Wielher было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Rebecca Lynn Wheel, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sisanna Hannah около 1130 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1155 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Thomas Wielher I nació en 1113, en Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Wielher, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Rebecca Lynn Wheel, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sisanna Hannah aproximadamente 1130, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1155, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años.
